responsibilities: Partner with client stakeholders to understand business challenges and translate them into analytics solutions
Design and deliver data analyses and dashboards that drive measurable improvements in client business outcomes
Lead discovery workshops to gather requirements and scope analytics engagements with clients
Present findings, insights, and strategic recommendations to client executives and key decision-makers
Develop data-driven business cases that quantify the value and ROI of proposed analytics initiatives
Manage multiple client engagements simultaneously, balancing timelines, deliverables, and stakeholder expectations
Build reusable analytics frameworks and templates that can be adapted across different client engagements
Train client teams on analytics tools and dashboards to enable long-term self-sufficiency
Collaborate with technical teams to ensure data solutions are scalable and aligned with client infrastructure
Identify upsell and expansion opportunities by uncovering additional analytics needs during client engagements
